hallucinations.description: Several references cite non-existent or fabricated arXiv papers with future dates (2025) and incomplete author information. These cannot be verified as real publications.
hallucinations.evidence: [2] T. Chen et al., arXiv:2502.16820, 2025; [3] X. Liu et al., arXiv:2503.15850, 2025; [5] "Ensemble-Based Uncertainty Estimation..." arXiv:2409.11234, 2024; [6] and [7] similarly lack verifiable existence.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations were found, primarily in the form of nonexistent citations. The experimental results and methodology appear consistent with the provided code execution, with no evidence of faked results or major mathematical errors.
